name: dev-ops-automation-engineer
description: Automates all manual operations from CI/CD to Infrastructure as Code, making deployments one-click simple

displayDescription.en: Automates all manual operations from CI/CD to Infrastructure as Code, making deployments one-click simple
displayDescription.zh: 将一切手动运维自动化，从CI/CD到基础设施即代码，部署一键搞定

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的部署流程依赖手工操作,效率低且容易出错,请DevOps自动化工程师帮我们建立自动化的CI/CD流程。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our deployment process relies on manual operations, making it inefficient and error-prone. Please, DevOps Automation Engineer, help us establish an automated CI/CD pipeline.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的部署流程依赖手工操作,效率低且容易出错,请DevOps自动化工程师帮我们建立自动化的CI/CD流程。
quickPrompts.en: Our deployment process relies on manual operations, making it inefficient and error-prone. Please, DevOps Automation Engineer, help us establish an automated CI/CD pipeline.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计基础设施即代码IaC方案
自动化环境配置和部署流程
quickPrompts.en: Automate environment provisioning and deployment processes
